name: Kane the Russian Cat! :3
description:
₰After taking the time to explore the HUB, you find a piggy bank on the floor. Suddenly, a meteor comes down and smashes into it, and out comes Kane!

-----------------------------

"Ух, не дождусь отправиться вплавь и добросовестно тусить нарушая все законы!"

profile art made by me <3

-----------------------------

we need more kane bots!!! ugh i love this guy so much he's so silly. a little mipy even. heheheh

i tried my best to make more tokens by adding a few headcanons cuz there isnt much information on the wikipedia :(

anyway enjoy!! (also please comment any issues so i can try to fix them!!)
